news.title:
Union Bank schedules meeting on 16 March 2026 to approve issuance of long-term bonds.
Bonds target infrastructure, housing, green projects to raise non-capital funds for development.
news.summary:
Union Bank schedules meeting on 16 March 2026 to approve issuance of long-term bonds.
Bonds target infrastructure, housing, green projects to raise non-capital funds for development.

news.title:
Union Bank of India held an investor meet with UBS Global Asset Management, Singapore on 26th Feb 2026.
The bank referred to publicly available documents during the one-on-one physical meeting in Mumbai.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India held an investor meet with UBS Global Asset Management, Singapore on 26th Feb 2026.
The bank referred to publicly available documents during the one-on-one physical meeting in Mumbai.

news.title:
Fitch affirms Union Bank of India's Long-Term IDR at BBB with stable outlook.
Viability Rating upgraded to bb from bb-; improved financials and asset quality cited.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms Union Bank of India's Long-Term IDR at BBB with stable outlook.
Viability Rating upgraded to bb from bb-; improved financials and asset quality cited.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.
news.summary:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.

news.title:
Union Bank of India schedules an investor/analyst meet with JPMorgan Asset Management on 20-Feb-2026 in London.
The meet will be in-person, with no unpublished price-sensitive information shared, using publicly available data.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India schedules an investor/analyst meet with JPMorgan Asset Management on 20-Feb-2026 in London.
The meet will be in-person, with no unpublished price-sensitive information shared, using publicly available data.

news.title:
RBI imposed a ₹2.8 lakh penalty on Union Bank of India for issues like mutilated notes, note shortages, and CCTV lapses.
The penalty was received on Feb 10, 2026; the bank stated the impact is not significant and measures are in place.
news.summary:
RBI imposed a ₹2.8 lakh penalty on Union Bank of India for issues like mutilated notes, note shortages, and CCTV lapses.
The penalty was received on Feb 10, 2026; the bank stated the impact is not significant and measures are in place.

news.title: Kallam Textiles Ltd gets notices from Union Bank for selling spinning and hydel units.
news.summary: Kallam Textiles Ltd gets notices from Union Bank for selling spinning and hydel units.

news.title:
Union Bank of India’s valuation upgraded to 'very attractive' due to robust metrics.
The bank’s performance outpaces benchmarks like the Sensex, boosting investor confidence.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India’s valuation upgraded to 'very attractive' due to robust metrics.
The bank’s performance outpaces benchmarks like the Sensex, boosting investor confidence.

news.title:
Industry leaders urge healthcare boost, MSME tax relief, and AI-driven growth in Budget 2026-27.
Focus on reforms and human capital development sought to sustain India's growth momentum.
news.summary:
Industry leaders urge healthcare boost, MSME tax relief, and AI-driven growth in Budget 2026-27.
Focus on reforms and human capital development sought to sustain India's growth momentum.

news.title:
Union Bank of India rose 4.6%, outperforming Sensex's 1.6% gain from Jan 27-30, 2026.
Gains driven by intraday highs, increased derivatives interest, and a new 52-week peak.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India rose 4.6%, outperforming Sensex's 1.6% gain from Jan 27-30, 2026.
Gains driven by intraday highs, increased derivatives interest, and a new 52-week peak.

news.title:
Union Bank of India and Bank of India may merge by year-end, creating the second-largest PSU bank with assets of ₹25.4 lakh crore in FY25.
The merged entity would rank sixth in market cap at ₹2.13 lakh crore, surpassing Canara Bank and PNB, but faces tech integration challenges.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India and Bank of India may merge by year-end, creating the second-largest PSU bank with assets of ₹25.4 lakh crore in FY25.
The merged entity would rank sixth in market cap at ₹2.13 lakh crore, surpassing Canara Bank and PNB, but faces tech integration challenges.

news.title:
Union Bank of India redeemed bond INE692A08136 on Jan 29, 2026.
Redemption amount was ₹222.9 crore; outstanding amount post-payment is NIL.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India redeemed bond INE692A08136 on Jan 29, 2026.
Redemption amount was ₹222.9 crore; outstanding amount post-payment is NIL.

news.title:
Union Bank appoints Dhirendra Jain as CFO from Feb 1, 2026.
Outgoing CFO Avinash Prabhu resigns effective Jan 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Union Bank appoints Dhirendra Jain as CFO from Feb 1, 2026.
Outgoing CFO Avinash Prabhu resigns effective Jan 31, 2026.

news.title:
Banks' LCR dipped in Q3 due to slow deposit growth and high funding needs; HDFC Bank's LCR fell to 116, Federal Bank to 124, and Union Bank to 123.6.
Credit grew 14.5% while deposits rose 12.7% as banks liquidated SLR for credit growth; revised RBI norms to aid LCR management from April.
news.summary:
Banks' LCR dipped in Q3 due to slow deposit growth and high funding needs; HDFC Bank's LCR fell to 116, Federal Bank to 124, and Union Bank to 123.6.
Credit grew 14.5% while deposits rose 12.7% as banks liquidated SLR for credit growth; revised RBI norms to aid LCR management from April.

news.title:
Union Bank of India faces a one-day nationwide strike on 27th Jan 2026.
The bank is preparing to ensure smooth operations; impact remains unknown.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India faces a one-day nationwide strike on 27th Jan 2026.
The bank is preparing to ensure smooth operations; impact remains unknown.

news.title:
Systematix's Nikhil Khandelwal foresees a tough 2026 for Indian equities due to weak growth, consumption pressure, and export challenges.
He favors PSU banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Union Bank for growth; highlights SFBs and metal recycling for strong potential.
news.summary:
Systematix's Nikhil Khandelwal foresees a tough 2026 for Indian equities due to weak growth, consumption pressure, and export challenges.
He favors PSU banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Union Bank for growth; highlights SFBs and metal recycling for strong potential.

news.title:
ED arrested Richa Industries' promoter Sandeep Gupta for fraud and laundering during insolvency.
Gupta allegedly diverted assets to shell entities, cheating banks of hundreds of crores.
news.summary:
ED arrested Richa Industries' promoter Sandeep Gupta for fraud and laundering during insolvency.
Gupta allegedly diverted assets to shell entities, cheating banks of hundreds of crores.

news.title:
Indian banks like Bank of India, HDFC Bank, Union Bank, Yes Bank, and Indian Overseas Bank reduced net NPAs to as low as 0.4% in Q3FY26.
Banks showed strong profit growth and net interest income, with Yes Bank's NIM improving to 2.6% and HDFC Bank's net profit rising 12.2% YoY.
news.summary:
Indian banks like Bank of India, HDFC Bank, Union Bank, Yes Bank, and Indian Overseas Bank reduced net NPAs to as low as 0.4% in Q3FY26.
Banks showed strong profit growth and net interest income, with Yes Bank's NIM improving to 2.6% and HDFC Bank's net profit rising 12.2% YoY.

news.title: PSU Bank index leads with Union Bank, Canara Bank, BoB, and SBI rising over 2%.
news.summary: PSU Bank index leads with Union Bank, Canara Bank, BoB, and SBI rising over 2%.
